heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 13125 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out this subchapter such sums as may be necessary for fiscal year 2007.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)131255 U.S.C. App. (EGA § 405), , ; , , ; , , ; , , ; , , ; , , ; , , ; , as added , , .Pub. L. 95–521, title IV, § 40592 Stat. 1863Pub. L. 98–150, § 1297 Stat. 963Pub. L. 100–598, § 2102 Stat. 3031Pub. L. 101–334, § 2104 Stat. 318Pub. L. 102–506, § 2106 Stat. 3280Pub. L. 104–179, § 3110 Stat. 1566Pub. L. 107–119, § 2115 Stat. 2382Pub. L. 109–289, div. B, title II, § 21069Pub. L. 110–5, § 2121 Stat. 57Oct. 26, 1978Nov. 11, 1983Nov. 3, 1988July 16, 1990Oct. 24, 1992Aug. 6, 1996Jan. 15, 2002Feb. 15, 2007Although provisions authorizing the appropriation of “such sums as may be necessary” are generally considered unnecessary, and although this provision is obsolete because it explicitly applies only to fiscal year 2007, the provision is nevertheless intentionally restated in chapter 131 of title 5, United States Code.
